# HugePlanning Owner Decision Register


## 1. Result

```text
Genuine constitutional owner decisions required now: NONE
```

The adversarial review found blocking design defects, but none requires a new Project Owner value choice before Designer revision.

## 2. Why the blocking findings are not owner questions

| Finding family | Reason no new owner decision is required |
|---|---|
| KA-F-001 | The Designer package already states a binding human C3/C4 acceptance floor. Revision restores that stated decision rather than choosing a new autonomy boundary. |
| KA-F-002–KA-F-004 | These close literal bypasses in bounded effects, independence, and evidence-to-purpose traceability without changing the protected values. |
| KA-F-005 | The constitutional goal can preserve both accountability and privacy/security through least-loss handling. Applicable legal details remain research/domain work. |
| KA-F-006–KA-F-007 | Managed continuation and accountable blocking preserve both safety and liveness; they do not force a risk-preference choice. |
| KA-F-008–KA-F-009 | These repair readiness semantics and cross-artifact consistency. |
| KA-F-010–KA-F-014 | These are proportionality, informed-authority, assumption-lifecycle, internal consistency, and vocabulary repairs. |
| KA-F-015 | Provider capability evidence is an enforcement/research question, not a constitutional owner decision. |

## 3. Conditional escalation rule

A genuine owner decision would arise only if the Designer proposes one of these substantive changes during revision:

1. allowing non-human acceptance of a category currently represented as C3/C4 or serious/critical/constitutional residual risk;
2. making a class of architecture change independently constitutional even when it changes no authority, autonomy, protected effect, or guarantee;
3. accepting a known privacy/security versus evidence-integrity trade-off that cannot be resolved through least-loss handling;
4. weakening a constitutional floor to reduce solo-owner burden.

If none of those choices is introduced, the Designer should revise without interrupting the owner.

## 4. Blocking effect

```text
Owner decision gate: OPEN / NOT REQUIRED
Designer revision gate: BLOCKED UNTIL REVISION
Enforcement Engineering gate: BLOCKED
Ratification gate: BLOCKED
```
